message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Kommunalwahlen in Nordrhein-Westfalen 1961","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0028","justification":"Municipal elections dataset for North Rhine-Westphalia in 1961; covers local (communal) political structures that shape community, urban, and rural life in the federal state during the early 1960s."},{"title":"Kommunalwahlen in Nordrhein-Westfalen 1964","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0030","justification":"Municipal elections in North Rhine-Westphalia in 1964; focuses on local governance at community level and reflects urban–rural political conditions in the mid‑1960s."},{"title":"Kommunalwahlen in Nordrhein-Westfalen 1969","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0033","justification":"1969 municipal elections in North Rhine-Westphalia; provides information on local political structures for cities and rural municipalities at the end of the 1960s, relevant for analyzing community and urban/rural differences."},{"title":"Landtagswahl in Nordrhein-Westfalen 1962","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0007","justification":"State election in North Rhine-Westphalia 1962; while not exclusively municipal, it includes regional political data for the state in the early 1960s that can be linked to patterns of community life in urban vs. rural areas."},{"title":"Landtagswahl in Nordrhein-Westfalen 1966","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0008","justification":"1966 state election data for North Rhine-Westphalia; useful for studying political context and regional differences (including urban vs. rural constituencies) affecting community life during the 1960s."},{"title":"Landtagswahl in Nordrhein-Westfalen 1970 (mit Antezedentendatei 1966)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0009","justification":"Contains 1970 state election data with antecedent file for 1966; the 1966 component falls within the 1960s and offers longitudinal state-level information that can be related to urban and rural community developments in North Rhine-Westphalia."},{"title":"Bundestagswahl 1961 – Nordrhein-Westfalen (aggregierte Wahlergebnisse)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0011","justification":"Aggregated federal election results for 1961 with breakdowns for North Rhine-Westphalia; can be used to examine political and social patterns across urban and rural constituencies in the state at the start of the 1960s."},{"title":"Bundestagswahl 1965 – Nordrhein-Westfalen (aggregierte Wahlergebnisse)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0012","justification":"1965 federal election results with data for North Rhine-Westphalia; supports analysis of mid‑1960s political behavior and its variation between urban and rural communities within the state."},{"title":"Bundestagswahl 1969 – Nordrhein-Westfalen (aggregierte Wahlergebnisse)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0013","justification":"1969 federal election aggregate results including North Rhine-Westphalia; relevant for studying late‑1960s political and social cleavages across urban and rural areas, informing research on community life."},{"title":"Wirtschafts- und Sozialdaten der Länder der Bundesrepublik Deutschland (Zeitraum umfasst die 1960er Jahre, inkl. NRW)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA1454","justification":"Dataset on economic and social indicators of the German Länder; includes North Rhine-Westphalia and time series covering the 1960s, allowing comparison of urban and rural development, population structure, and socio-economic conditions influencing community life."}]}
